Thrusting a coral-forged trident forward in a powerful lunging strike through open water.
Patrolling a sunken fortress perimeter, scanning the dark water ahead with vigilant eyes.
Sharpening a blade of volcanic obsidian against a whetstone with deliberate strokes.
Pulling a battered shield from a fallen enemy's wreckage on the seafloor.
Charging through a cloud of silt with weapon raised, wake trailing behind her tail.
Bracing against a current surge while holding a defensive position with planted feet.
Inspecting battle scars across her tail scales with veteran familiarity and pride.
Launching upward from an ambush position in a kelp forest canopy.
Strapping on coral-plate armor, tightening abalone buckles across her chest.
Standing guard at an ancient temple entrance, trident planted firmly beside her.
Spinning a weighted net overhead before releasing it toward distant shadows.
Deflecting incoming debris with her shield raised high above her head.
Diving downward in a vertical attack dive with spear extended below.
Gripping a barnacle-encrusted sword hilt, drawing the blade from its scabbard.
Sweeping her trident horizontally in a wide arc to clear surrounding territory.
Vaulting over a crumbling stone barrier using her trident as a pole.
Slamming her armored tail against a warning gong to sound the alarm.
Retrieving arrows from a quiver strapped across her scaled back.
Blocking a canyon passage with her body, arms spread wide in warning.
Circling a shipwreck cautiously, scanning for threats in the shadows.
Hoisting a war banner high overhead, claiming conquered underwater ground.
Brandishing twin daggers in crossed defensive stance before her chest.
Kicking powerfully off a reef wall to propel herself into combat range.
Adjusting her helmet strap while maintaining watch over dark waters.
Striking a training dummy with repeated spear thrusts in practiced sequence.
